questionHtml: Show that the time taken for the ball to reach the surface of the table is about 0.2 s.
markschemeHtml:
t = «2dg=» 0.22 «s»
OR

t = 2×0.249.8  ✓ 

Answer to 2 or more significant figures or formula with variables replaced by correct values.

meta.title: Show that the time taken for the ball to reach the surface of the table is about 0.2 s.
